calendar.matters:
Petition To Accept Resignation Of Current Trustee; Appoint Successor Trustee; And Waiver Of Accounting
Off Calendar May-24-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Martin Behn for (petitioner) Geraldine Earp. Bertram Thomas (nominated successor trustee) in Propria Persona.

The Court stated that this is a petition for change of trustees, that it is also seeking to waive accountings and bond, that the court has no issue with the resignation or the appointment of successor trustee there is an issue with the waiver of bond. Mr. Behn stated that they are working with the accountant and that they are prepared to submit a declaration regarding the value. The Court stated that it will take the petition for order confirming trustee's actions, etc., under submission pending receipt of the declaration. Mr. Behn is to submit a proposed order.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Barrientos. (Not Reported)
